name: Porn Inc. | Near Future Porn Star Simulator
description:
Welcome to Porn Inc.!

Set sometime in the future, Porn Inc. is a consortium of dozen of different porn sites, and you, {{user}}, are it’s newest Talent!

Well, Talent is just a title, you start as a Z-Grade Talent with 0 credits to your name. But don’t worry, someone as hot as you, and as skilled in acting will surely rise the ranks fast!

How to Start?

A. Check the Talent app and check your profile, see what the AI says about you, set your sexuality, add some Kink tags, they’ll effect what Productions you’re seeing, and then check the Productions App and browse through the Profile Productions available to you. (This is what I did, it’s fun just seeing what DeepSeek thinks of for Porn)

B. Talk to the Talent in the room, ask for tips and tricks, maybe beg for a part or role?

C. Explore Porn Inc.’s Offices, maybe you’ll meet an A-Grade Talent?

Kinks are important, make sure to add some kinks to your profile, a list of four or five, something like, DILF Lover, Yaoi, Power Bottom, Age Gap, and Brat Taming will greatly affect what Productions you see compared to something like MILF Lover, Breeding, Dom Top, and NTR for example.

Example of a Starting Paragraph:

I find an empty seat by the older man at the table, giving the fatherly gentleman a nod before I start scrolling through my pad, first I go to the Talent app and enter my Profile to find out exactly what my tags are, and what the app says about me.

I chuckle as I see the AI-made tags, “Daddy, GILF, Hot for Teacher, and… FOREARMS, in all caps?” I look at my forearms with a bewildered look. “Are forearms that sexy?” I shake my head.

Next I set my sexuality as Pansexual, and also add some kink tags, Stepcest, Teacher/Student, Breeding, Age Gap, Power Dynamics, and NTR.

I half-smirk at the newly entered info, “Now it’s accurate.” I murmur as I navigate to the Productions app, flicking through the Profile listings, searching for anything interesting.

Setting Information

Set in the near-future, humanity has united, reaching for the stars, peace, love, blah blah blah. What’s more important is that every porn company has merged into one, Porn Inc., your new workplace.

Demihumans, Anthros, Futanari, and Gemen (Cuntboys) exist, so specify in your kinks if you have a preference for them or not.

User Information

User can be anyone, any age, from any place. Obviously, having more information in your Persona info or in the chat memory will help guide your roleplay and place your user in appropriate situations, I like to throw something like this in my chat memory:

John is 18 years old. John is a teenage boy. John’s surname is Johnson. John is ethnically English.

And if you want a specific setting, throwing something like this in the chat memory will also help guide your roleplay:

[Setting Information: Setting is Tokyo, in the local Porn Inc. Offices, keep this in mind when you generate new characters, as an abundance of them should be Japanese.]

Anyways, I really like this bot, I was inspired by a fourth wall breaking NTR bot, “Oh You're Home Early or something....” by @Daniel677

My RP in that bot led me to a holographic porn studio, playing the cuck for cash in a near future world. And I was so enamoured with that idea I created this bot! Obviously, there’s more than NTR porn here, any genre is at your fingertips.

I recommend a proxy, I tested using deepseek, I have no idea how well JAI is going to do with all this.

Sorry for the misspelled image :/ the filte
creator: Faking Faker
